import io
import string
import list

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = list.len(tokens)
  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    mut best = 0
    mut best_abs = 0
    mut i = 0
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          let a = abs_int(v)
          if first
            best = v
            best_abs = a
            first = false
          else
            if a < best_abs
              best = v
              best_abs = a
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if first
      Err("no input")
    else
      println("min_abs=#{best}")
      Ok(())
    end
  end
end
